components.value: V, S, M (a pinch of dried toadstool)

description.value: Using this spell, the caster rapidly decomposes the flesh from a single corpse of size Huge or smaller, leaving behind a perfectly cleaned skeleton. If it is cast on a non-skeletal corporeal undead, the creature takes a â2 penalty on all rolls and to its Armor Class and CMD for 1 minute.
